NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is made as of October 15, 2023, by and between Dr. Tan Wei Ming, NRIC No. S2345678B, residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238858, and Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, NRIC No. S8765432C, representing Luminary Innovations Pte. Ltd., UEN 200912345G, with its principal office at 456 Raffles Place, Singapore 048621.

1. CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION. For the purposes of this Agreement, "Confidential Information" shall mean any data, documents, project plans, or other material provided by either party, whether oral or written, that is marked as confidential or would reasonably be understood to be confidential. The parties agree that the disclosure of project status updates shall not be deemed Confidential Information.

2. OBLIGATIONS OF THE PARTIES. Each party agrees not to disclose any Confidential Information to third parties without prior written consent. Furthermore, all communications shall be directed through official channels, such as the designated email addresses: tan.weiming@luminary.sg and aishah.abdullah@innovations.sg, or via phone at +65 6123 4567. Any breach of this Agreement will be subject to penalties as outlined in the SPA, which involves a financial consideration of SGD 50,000.

https://example.sg/user/S2345678B is a resource intended solely for internal reference.
